details: The agent correctly executed the appropriate commands to gather all required information. It retrieved PR details (title: 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author: joshavant), CI check results (19 success, 4 failure, 7 skipped from 30 shown checks), and comments (1 Greptile bot comment summarized accurately). The agent correctly handled the initial command error by adjusting the parameter name from --pull-number to --pullNumber, then ran parallel commands for all required data. The final answer accurately reflects the data returned by the tools with no hallucination.
